anim.window¶

class anim.window(title='Animation', style='dark', height=0.75, width=None, aspect_ratio=1, information=None)¶

Animation-specific window.

__init__(title='Animation', style='dark', height=0.75, width=None, aspect_ratio=1, information=None)¶

Creates a new window.

The dark style is set by defaut (if the corresponding stylesheet is found).

add(canva, row=None, col=None, **kwargs)¶

Add a canva or a layout

show()¶

Display the animation window

  • Display the animation

  • Defines the shortcuts

  • Initialize and start the animation
